data.title: PROSPERITY BANCSHARES, INC.® INVITES YOU TO JOIN ITS FIRST QUARTER 2026 EARNINGS CONFERENCE CALL
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Houston-based Prosperity Bancshares, Inc.® (NYSE: PB), is set to announce its First Quarter 2026 earnings before the market opens on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. The conference call is scheduled to take place at 11:30 AM Eastern Time.

data.title: CMS Energy to Announce 2026 First Quarter Results on April 28
data.description: In Jackson, Michigan, CMS Energy disclosed their plan to unveil the financial results for the first quarter of 2026 and present a business and financial forecast at 10:00 a.m. EDT on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. The announcement mentioned that a webcast of the presentation will be accessible on CMS Energy's website.

data.title: Evolent To Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Thursday, May 7, 2026
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Evolent Health, Inc. (NYSE: EVH) disclosed plans to unveil its Q1 2026 financial data on May 7, 2026, prior to the market opening. Evolent Health, Inc. is dedicated to improving health outcomes for individuals dealing with intricate health conditions. The company's upcoming financial report is highly anticipated by investors and industry analysts for insights into its performance in the first quarter of 2026. Stay tuned for important figures and analyses when the results are made public.

data.title: STARZ TO RELEASE FIRST QUARTER EARNINGS FOR 2026 AND HOLD ANALYST AND INVESTOR CONFERENCE CALL FOLLOWING MARKET CLOSE ON THURSDAY, MAY 7
data.description: Santa Monica, California, April 7th, 2026 - Entertainment company STARZ (NASDAQ: STRZ) has revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026, concluding on March 31, 2026, on Thursday, May 7. The senior management team will conduct a dedicated call with analysts and investors to deliberate on the outcomes.

data.title: Encompass Health announces date of 2026 first-quarter earnings call
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama, on April 7, 2026, Encompass Health Corp. (NYSE: EHC) stated that it is set to disclose its first quarter performance for the period concluding on March 31, 2026, after markets shut on Thursday, April 30, 2026. An investor conference call has been scheduled by the company at 10 a.m. Eastern Time on that same day.

data.title: ImpediMed Appoints Erik Anderson as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: A former executive from Hologic has been selected to spearhead the upcoming growth and commercial strategies for ImpediMed, a major player in medical technology. The company, based in CARLSBAD, Calif., announced this development on April 7, 2026, via a press release on PRNewswire. ImpediMed specializes in creating and bringing to market technologies focused on actively monitoring and controlling fluid levels and body status. This change in leadership is aimed at propelling ImpediMed into its next phase of expansion and operational success.

data.title: Ellington Financial Declares Monthly Common Dividend
data.description: In Old Greenwich, Connecticut, Ellington Financial Inc. (NYSE: EFC) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a monthly dividend of $0.13 per share for common stockholders. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on May 29, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 30, 2026. The press release includes cautionary language concerning forward-looking statements, as defined by the safe harbor provisions of the Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995.

data.title: Annaly Capital Management, Inc. Announces Dates of First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call
data.description: Annaly Capital Management, Inc. has disclosed the schedule for the release of its first quarter financial results for 2026, along with the subsequent conference call. The company stated that the financial results will be announced on [specific date], and the conference call to discuss these results will take place on [specific date]. This information was shared without mention of other specific details.

data.title: Essex Announces Release and Conference Call Dates for Its First Quarter 2026 Earnings
data.description: San Mateo-based company, Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS), is set to disclose its first quarter 2026 financial results on April 28, 2026, following the market closing. A conference call featuring senior management is planned for April 29, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. Pacific Time or 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The call will be accessible to all interested parties via the company's website, www.essex.com, under the Investors section.

data.title: Copper Property CTL Pass Through Trust Issues Q4 2025 Master Lease JCP Store Performance Disclosures
data.description: Jersey City, New Jersey: The Copper Property CTL Pass Through Trust has submitted a Form 8-K, revealing the Q4 2025 performance data for its Master Lease JCP store. Interested parties can find more details, including the Trust’s Monthly and Quarterly Reports, and other SEC filings on the Trust’s official website at www.ctltrust.net. The Copper Property CTL Pass Through Trust was established with a focus on property investments. Visitors to the website can access a wide array of information related to the Trust.

data.title: C.H. Robinson First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Scheduled for Wednesday, April 29, 2026
data.description: A company based in Eden Prairie, Minnesota has announced that C.H. Robinson's first quarter earnings for 2026 will be released on Wednesday, April 29. The company has scheduled a conference call to discuss these earnings.

data.title: Equifax Announces Earnings Release Date and Conference Call for First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Equifax® (NYSE: EFX) is set to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. The official report will be unveiled on Tuesday, April 21, at 6:30 a.m. Eastern Time (ET). Following this, Equifax will conduct a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day. This quarterly update is highly anticipated by investors and analysts alike to gain insights into the company's earnings and overall financial health during this period.

data.title: FDIC proposes rules for stablecoin issuers under GENIUS Act, excludes tokens from deposit insurance.
data.description: The FDIC has put forward a proposal that sets federal oversight guidelines for stablecoin issuers. Under this proposal, tokens are not covered by deposit insurance protections.

data.title: Washington Wizards star Bub Carrington and MedStar Health delivers "Bub Scrubs" to hospital staff
data.description: On April 7, 2026, in Washington, there was a palpable buzz in the room as the first boxes were being opened. Bub Carrington, a guard for the Washington Wizards, made a special visit to MedStar Washington Hospital Center. During his visit, he distributed his custom-designed scrubs to the hardworking nurses and staff. This generous gesture sparked excitement among those present.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Loses Ground As Iran Deadline Nears; These IBD 50 Names Are Moving (Live Coverage)
data.description: The Dow Jones index experiences a decline as the deadline approaches for President Trump's decision regarding the Strait of Hormuz. Notably, the stock of Apple also sees a decrease in value. Today's stock market scenario reveals the Dow losing traction in anticipation of the impending Iran deadline. Additionally, in the live coverage by Investor's Business Daily, insights are shared on the movements of specific stocks, including those from the IBD 50 list.
